---
title: "My HW2 for DACS 690V Spring"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard) # always
```

## Intro {.sidebar}

Author: Patrick McGrath<br>DACSS690V Spring 2026


## Row {data-height="500"}

### **THREE-GEAR CARS ARE DOMINANT** 

```{r}
## for del1Draft.rds
link1="C:/Users/patri/OneDrive/Desktop/DACSS/DACSS690V/Week_2_HW/gear_plot.rds"
readRDS(link1)
```

### **FEW CARS have SIX or more CARBURATORS**

```{r}
## for del2Draft.rds
#link2=""
link2="C:/Users/patri/OneDrive/Desktop/DACSS/DACSS690V/Week_2_HW/carb_plot.rds"
readRDS(link2)
```

## Row {data-height="500"}

### **Only 5-gear cars utilize the 6 and 8 carburator setups.**

```{r}
## for del3Draft.rds
#link3=""
link3="C:/Users/patri/OneDrive/Desktop/DACSS/DACSS690V/Week_2_HW/cyl_dist_plot.rds"
readRDS(link3)
```
